creator: robak@freebsd.org
text: Unfortunately, your patch is not acceptable for many reasons (ports should have COMMENT section, after changing PORTVERSION you should not bump PORTREVISION, you should use PORTEPOCH and so on) so I have to reject it, but feel free to work on it using Porters Handbook (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/) and submit it once again when it is ready.
